title: Rich Crunchy Hunan Rice Fried Rice
description: Buttery, crunchy and light Chinese Hunan dish featuring chicken stock concentrate, baked to perfection, and Ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly.
instructions: Heat a wok over medium-high heat and melt butter.
Add vegetable oil and swirl until the butter foams.
Stir in chicken stock concentrate, soy sauce, sugar, white pepper, and chili flakes, and cook until fragrant.
Pour cooked rice into the wok and stir to coat each grain with the sauce.
Continue stirring for 3 minutes until the rice is evenly heated and slightly toasted.
Add scallions and cashews, and stir for an additional 2 minutes so that the nuts crunch.
Taste and adjust seasoning with extra soy sauce if needed.
Transfer the fried rice to a baking dish and bake at 180°C for 5 minutes to crisp the top.
Remove from oven and allow to cool for 2 minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy the buttery crunch.
